title: royena macrocalyx
intro: Royena macrocalyx, also known as the royal rose or royal calyx, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Royena macrocalyx is often used as an infusion or tincture, and can also be applied topically to skin issues or used as a mouthwash to promote oral health.
